summary: Verified favicon set, resized og:image (1200x630), and canonical placeholder with TODO comment. Also ran full regression on hero portrait, journal images (3), Fraunces font on h1/h2, all sections, and filter buttons. All checks pass.

canonical.todo_comment: <!-- TODO: Replace the canonical URL below with your real domain once live (e.g. https://akashpuri.com/) --> at line 19 (immediately preceding canonical link)
canonical.no_leftover_hardcoded_domain: Only occurrence of 'akashpuri.com' in served HTML is inside the TODO comment as an example placeholder; no actual href/URL uses it. Confirmed via grep.

critical_code_review_comments: index.html is 1372 lines — mostly acceptable for a single-file vanilla site, but could be split into external CSS/JS files if further growth is expected.

og:url is set to '/' (relative). For proper Open Graph sharing, this should also be updated to an absolute URL when the real domain is known — consider extending the TODO comment to remind about og:url as well.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iteration_1 verified font/portrait/journal/SEO. iteration_2 verified favicon set, resized og-image (1200x630 confirmed via PIL and meta tags), canonical='/' with TODO comment. No hardcoded akashpuri.com references outside the intentional TODO example. All regression checks pass. If future iterations replace canonical/og:url with real domain, verify 'akashpuri.com' or new domain is no longer in a TODO but in the actual href attributes.
